title: The Reverie Opens Under Hidden Shadows
description: On pages 14–15, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14, Five Elders, Imu as The Reverie gathers world leaders while hidden powers at Mariejois begin to move.
scene: World leaders gather at Mariejois while the Revolutionary Army and the secret ruler behind the Empty Throne move in the shadows.

dialogue.speaker: Imu
dialogue.text: Someone is sitting on the empty throne!!!!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The LIGHT that needs to be extinguished from history...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Have you decided who it should be yet!?

summary: This section advances the Reverie storyline with 12 dialogue beats. The Reverie looks ceremonial on the surface, but Imu, the Five Elders, and the Revolutionaries turn it into a major political pivot.
